external_services.service_name: Appearance at the Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod Hearings/ Sessions
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Appearance at the Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod Hearings/ Sessions

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Legal documents related to the matter to be heard (1 original copy)
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Mayor's Office and other involved government offices

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Notice of Committee Hearing/ Session (1 photocopy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all relevant documents and other pieces of object evidence as applicable
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Accept documents; 1.2. Send clarificatory questions when necessary
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer V, Assistant City Legal Officer, Legal Officer IV
Legal Officer IV, Assistant City Legal Officer

steps.agency_action: 1.4. Attend the hearing and engage in the deliberation
steps.person_responsible: Legal Officer IV, Assistant City Legal Officer, City Legal Officer
